featureGatePolicy: kubernetes-defaults
evaluationPhase: snapshot-routing
configurationKind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
webhooks:
  - index: 0
    name: "missing-namespace.example.com"
    sourcePath: ".configuration.validatingWebhookConfiguration.webhooks[0]"
    configurationKind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
    determination: indeterminate
    outcome: null
    terminalReasons:
      - NAMESPACE_CONTEXT_MISSING
    trace:
      - sequence: 0
        stage: "namespaceSelector"
        sourcePath: ".configuration.validatingWebhookConfiguration.webhooks[0].namespaceSelector"
        result: indeterminate
        reasonCode: NAMESPACE_CONTEXT_MISSING
        terminal: true
        pending: false
        discarded: false
        inputSummary:
          "namespace": "payments"
    diagnostics:
      - sourcePath: ".configuration.validatingWebhookConfiguration.webhooks[0].namespaceSelector"
        code: NAMESPACE_CONTEXT_MISSING
        severity: warning
        message: "required fixture context is missing"
        missingContext: "namespace" ("payments")
